# Nav-signal modulation & code-tracking reference.
# PART (a) oracle: IS-GPS-200 GPS C/A Gold codes (G1/G2 LFSRs + Table 3-Ia
#   G2 phase taps), EXACT integer periodic auto/cross-correlation of the
#   real generated PRN 1..8 sequences. Gold 1967 three-valued set for n=10
#   is {-1,-65,63}; max|off-peak corr| = t(10) = 65. kshana CodeFamily::Gold
#   {n:10} reports 65/1023 from the t(n)/L closed form -- confronted here
#   with the MEASURED maxima of the actually-generated codes.
# PART (b) oracle: scipy.signal.periodogram unit-area baseband PSD of
#   BPSK-R(1) and sine-BOC(1,1) vs kshana Modulation::psd closed form.
# Consumed by tests/nav_signal_modulation_code_tracking_reference.rs.
# L=1023 N=10 t(10)=65 f0=1023000.0
# AUTO prn | maxsidelobe | distinct_offpeak_values(comma)
AUTO 1 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 2 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 3 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 4 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 5 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
AUTO 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
# CROSS prnA prnB | maxcross | distinct_values(comma)
CROSS 1 2 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 3 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 4 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 5 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 1 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 3 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 4 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 5 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 2 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 3 4 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 3 5 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 3 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 3 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 3 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 4 5 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 4 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 4 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 4 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 5 6 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 5 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 5 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 6 7 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 6 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
CROSS 7 8 | 65 | -65,-1,63
# GOLDSET observed_union=[-65, -1, 63] expected_subset_of=[-65, -1, 63]
GOLDSET -65,-1,63
# FIRST10 prn | octal
FIRST10 1 | 1440
FIRST10 2 | 1620
FIRST10 3 | 1710
FIRST10 4 | 1744
FIRST10 5 | 1133
FIRST10 6 | 1455
FIRST10 7 | 1131
FIRST10 8 | 1454
# PART (b) PSD: 0.5*Rc bin-averaged, unit-area normalised. The Rust side
#   recomputes kshana Modulation::psd analytically on the SAME bins and
#   compares to the empirical periodogram column (RMS over the band).
# Columns: PSD binCenter/Rc | empirical_bpsk*Rc | empirical_boc11*Rc
# PSDMETA Rc=1023000.0 fs=40920000.0 n_chips=1023 n_epochs=2000 bin_width_rc=0.5
PSD -11.7500 | 0.0004972949357347681 | 0.00022758802286081456
PSD -11.2500 | 0.0005169776228296085 | 0.0029164729610711274
